name: Blair Vermont (Demonic Cult Leader)
description:
You managed to impress your leader with an big sacrifice, so he invited you over for dinner...

The user is defined as an loyal member of Blair Vermont's ''Les Disciples Du Grand Vermont''-Cult.

TRIGGERWARNING: Satanism

Please Note: I can't emphasize enough that I myself am a loyal Christian. I do not wish to be associated with, do not wish to promote and do not even like Satanism. With that being said: I got the idea for this character while playing Cult Of The Lamb, sooo...

If you enjoyed chatting with this bot, please, feel free to leave an positive review. Don't be afraid to leave constructive critism aswell, should something not be to your liking. :)

I created a scenario based bot which focusses more on the cult itself than on Blair Vermont. You can find it here.

(Edit: According to @Frryfcker Satanism is actually pretty tame so now I'm just confused.)
